blueprint.description:
Requires Synchronous input when initializing. There is a constant combinator that connects to all input belts going into the head block. Set the 'S' signal to 0 to block all inputs and then set it to 1 to get everything starting in sequence. I wanted to make a belt based design for the sake of it.

Also, I'm not sure how to best control the input and intermediate inserters in the red circuit block, so I only controlled the outputs. That's probably laggier than necessary.

entities.name: constant-combinator
entities.player_description: Belts require synchronous input when starting up. Set this combinator to 1 after every intermediate backs up

blueprint.label: 24_mcmayhem57
